# Costa Rica Here and Now

An interactive Costa Rica adventure guide designed for three traveler profiles — solo explorers, couples, and families. The guide offers curated itineraries spanning 5, 7, and 10 days, with entry points from both San José (SJO) and Liberia airports. It embraces the full geographic diversity of Costa Rica, including the often-overlooked Caribbean coast, and aims to deliver a dynamic, easy-to-navigate planning experience that feels adventurous yet approachable.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Craft Your Costa Rica Adventure Itinerary for Solo Travelers — Costa Rica Here and Now

URL: https://example.com
Description: Unleash your wild side with Costa Rica adventure itineraries built for solo explorers, couples, and families. Discover 5, 7, and 10-day trips from San José or Liberia. Start your journey now!

Craft Your Costa Rica Adventure Itinerary for Solo Travelers — Costa Rica Here and Now

# Your Costa Rica Adventure, Crafted for You


### Curated 5, 7, and 10-day journeys for solo explorers, couples, and families — from SJO or Liberia, including the vibrant Caribbean coast.


Explore Itineraries
Plan Your Trip













## Choose your travel style


Every route is adapted to your pace, energy, and logistics. Whether you're roaming solo, escaping as a couple, or traveling with the whole family, Costa Rica delivers an unforgettable rhythm.












### Solo Explorers


Craft your own path with total freedom. From volcano hikes to Caribbean surf towns, every day is yours to shape.


- Maximum flexibility & spontaneity

- Hostel-to-hotel route options

- Social hubs & quiet escapes













### Couples' Escape


Romance meets raw nature. Private thermal springs, sunset sails, and boutique eco-lodges tucked into the jungle canopy.


- Scenic drives & hidden waterfalls

- Adults-only eco-retreats

- Farm-to-table dining experiences













### Family Adventures


Easy transitions, kid-friendly thrills, and wildlife encounters that spark wonder in every generation.


- Sloth sanctuaries & turtle hatcheries

- Shorter drive days & pool stops

- Hands-on chocolate & coffee tours


















## Your Journey, Your Pace


Shorter routes focus on fewer regions while longer routes connect multiple ecosystems, from the Pacific coast to the Caribbean sea.










5 Days

### Quick Escape



Ideal for a focused Costa Rica adventure itinerary for solo travelers or a short couples getaway. Dive deep into one region—volcano, cloud forest, or beach—without feeling rushed.



SJO
Arenal Volcano & Hot Springs


LIR
Guanacaste Gold Coast Beaches












7 Days

### Classic Explorer



The perfect 7 day Costa Rica family adventure trip or couples vacation. Combine two contrasting regions—volcano and cloud forest, or rainforest and Caribbean coast—with comfortable travel days.



SJO
Manuel Antonio & Monteverde Cloud Forest


LIR
Rincón de la Vieja & Tamarindo Surf












10 Days

### Grand Odyssey



The ultimate Costa Rica couples adventure vacation or family deep-dive. Weave from the Pacific through volcanoes and cloud forests all the way to the Caribbean coast, experiencing the country's full geographic diversity.



SJO
Caribbean Coast, Arenal & Manuel Antonio


LIR
Nicoya Peninsula, Tenorio & Tortuguero





















## Costa Rica's full geographic range, from Pacific to Caribbean


Our guide doesn't stop at the Pacific. The Caribbean coast is a core experience — a vibrant, often-overlooked side of the country that completes any Costa Rica adventure itinerary for solo travelers, couples, and families alike.











Pacific

### Golden Coast & Surf


Endless sunsets, world-class breaks, and laid-back beach towns from Guanacaste to the Nicoya Peninsula.











Highlands

### Volcanoes & Mist


Hike through emerald cloud forests, soak in thermal springs, and witness Arenal's perfect cone.











Caribbean

### Wild Caribbean Soul


Reggae rhythms, Afro-Caribbean flavors, and untouched coral reefs — this is Costa Rica's vibrant, essential other half.











Inland

### Jungle & River Thrills


White-water rafting, ziplining, and wildlife-rich rivers perfect for a 7 day Costa Rica family adventure trip.
















## Start planning the Costa Rica route that fits your time and travel style


Our curated adventure guide helps you narrow the choices without the complexity — whether you're a solo explorer, a couple, or a family, your perfect 5, 7, or 10-day itinerary is waiting.



View Detailed Itineraries



Contact for Guidance

## Find Your Travel Tribe: Solo, Couple, or Family Adventures — Costa Rica Here and Now

URL: https://example.com/traveler-profiles
Description: Whether you roam alone, with a partner, or the whole crew, match your travel style to the perfect Costa Rica experience. Dive into curated profiles and plan boldly today.

Find Your Travel Tribe: Solo, Couple, or Family Adventures — Costa Rica Here and Now

- Traveler Profiles

- Regions & Routes



Contact









# Your Costa Rica, Your Way


The same country can feel radically different depending on who you're traveling with. Whether you're chasing solo serenity, romantic sunsets, or family-sized thrills, we've shaped three distinct lenses to help you plan the perfect 5, 7, or 10-day adventure — from both San José and Liberia airports, all the way to the Caribbean coast.











### Solo Explorers


For the independent spirit craving off-the-grid trails, spontaneous detours, and pure freedom.












### Couples


Romance meets adventure with private hideaways, sunset sails, and two-person itineraries.












### Families


Designed for all ages, balancing wildlife encounters, safe thrills, and logistics that actually work.






















Solo

## Freedom to Roam


Costa Rica is a solo traveler's dream — safe, welcoming, and full of spontaneous encounters. From the volcanic north to the Caribbean coast, every route is designed for independence and ease.


- Social hostels & eco-lodges — meet fellow adventurers in vibrant communal spaces.

- Simple public transport & shuttles — easy connections between SJO, Liberia, and hidden coastal gems.

- Flex your own itinerary — add a spontaneous night in Tortuguero or extend your surf stay in Santa Teresa.








Couples

## Adventure for Two


Balance adrenaline with intimacy. Our couples' itineraries weave thrilling zip-line mornings with sunset hot springs and private beach dinners, creating a rhythm that feels both exciting and deeply romantic.


- Scenic boutique stays — handpicked rooms with volcano views and private plunge pools.

- Active days, serene evenings — hike to La Fortuna waterfall by day, soak in thermal rivers by night.

- Romantic settings — candlelit dinners on the sand and sunrise coffee tours in the Central Valley.








Families

## Wild Wonders, Together


Costa Rica is a natural playground for all ages. Our family-focused plans keep travel distances manageable, pack in wildlife-rich stops, and include activities that thrill kids and adults alike — from sloth sanctuaries to gentle river floats.


- Short, scenic drives — routes under 3 hours with plenty of fruit stand and wildlife spotting breaks.

- Hands-on wildlife encounters — visit rescue centers, spot howler monkeys, and watch sea turtles nest.

- Activities for every age — gentle hanging bridges, chocolate-making workshops, and calm Caribbean beaches.






















## Adventures for Every Traveler


From solo escapes to family expeditions, discover how Costa Rica's diverse landscapes — including the vibrant Caribbean coast — come alive across these curated highlights.










Solo

### Caribbean Village Immersion


Wander through Cahuita and Puerto Viejo, where reggae rhythms meet Afro-Caribbean cuisine. Perfect for solo explorers craving authentic cultural connections and jungle-meets-beach solitude.










Solo

### Monteverde Cloud Forest Solo Trek


Zip through misty canopies and hike hanging bridges at your own pace. Monteverde's biodiversity offers the ultimate Costa Rica adventure itinerary for solo travelers seeking self-discovery.










Couples

### Volcano-to-Coast Scenic Loop


Start with Arenal's thermal hot springs, then wind down to Guanacaste's golden shores. A romantic Costa Rica couples adventure vacation blending fire, water, and sunset sails.










Couples

### Secret Caribbean Hideaways


Escape to Manzanillo's quiet coves and Punta Uva's palm-fringed shores. The Caribbean side delivers intimate moments far from the crowds — a true Costa Rica couples adventure vacation gem.










Families

### Sloth Trails & Calm Beaches


Gentle wildlife walks in Manuel Antonio where sloths and monkeys steal the show, followed by safe, shallow swimming at Playa Espadilla. An ideal 7 day Costa Rica family adventure trip highlight.










Families

### Tortuguero Turtle Magic


Witness nesting sea turtles on the Caribbean coast's wildest beaches. Tortuguero's canals and wildlife create an unforgettable 7 day Costa Rica family adventure trip that kids will treasure forever.
















## Find Your Costa Rica Travel Style


Every journey through Costa Rica is deeply personal. Whether you're chasing solo serenity, romantic escapes, or family thrills, our comparison matrix helps you match your travel personality to the perfect rhythm of adventure.










### Solo Explorer

Freedom & Discovery






### Couples

Romance & Connection






### Families

Adventure for All Ages







Pace


Fast & Flexible

Pack light and move quickly between coasts. Ideal for spontaneous detours and hostel-hopping.



Balanced & Unhurried

Savor sunsets and lazy mornings. Mix adventure with beachside lounging and private dinners.



Steady & Structured

Comfortable pacing with built-in downtime. Kid-friendly transitions between activities.








Ideal Regions


Caribbean & Nicoya

Off-the-beaten-path surf towns, jungle hikes, and vibrant local culture on the Caribbean coast.



Arenal & Manuel Antonio

Volcanic hot springs, wildlife-rich rainforests, and stunning coastal national parks.



Guanacaste & Central Valley

Family-friendly resorts, gentle nature walks, and interactive coffee farm tours.








Transport Comfort


Shuttle & Public Bus

Budget-friendly shared shuttles and local buses for an authentic, ground-level experience.



Private 4x4 & SUV

Rugged luxury vehicles for scenic drives with the freedom to stop wherever the view demands.



Private Van & Driver

Spacious, air-conditioned vans with experienced drivers who know the best family pit stops.








Adventure Level


High Adrenaline

White-water rafting, zip-lining, and night jungle treks. Push your limits every day.



Moderate & Romantic

Horseback riding on the beach, snorkeling, and sunset catamaran sails.



Gentle & Interactive

Sloth sanctuary visits, chocolate tours, and shallow-water kayaking.








Downtime


Social & Active

Beach bonfires, surf hostels, and local dance nights keep the energy high even during rest.



Intimate & Restorative

Couples massages, infinity pools overlooking the jungle, and private plunge pools.



Playful & Relaxed

Pool games, wildlife spotting from the balcony, and early bedtimes for little adventurers.














## Find Your Perfect Costa Rica Route


Whether you're a solo explorer chasing waves, a couple seeking hidden waterfalls, or a family ready for volcano adventures — pair your traveler type with a 5, 7, or 10 day itinerary crafted from either San José or Liberia. The Caribbean coast is waiting.


Explore All Itineraries

# Curated Adventure Itineraries


Discover Costa Rica through routes designed around your timeline and travel style. Whether you're a solo explorer chasing surf breaks and wildlife, a couple seeking volcano sunsets and cloud forest walks, or a family ready for Caribbean snorkeling and jungle canopy tours — every itinerary adapts to your profile and arrival airport in San José (SJO) or Liberia (LIR).












5
Days

Quick escapes packed with highlights — ideal for first-timers and weekend adventurers.



7
Days

The sweet spot for balancing coast, volcano, and rainforest without feeling rushed.



10
Days

Deep dives across both coasts — explore the Caribbean, cloud forests, and remote peninsulas.













## Curated Costa Rica Adventure Itineraries


Three durations, two entry points, and countless landscapes — find the route that fits your rhythm, whether you're a solo explorer, a couple, or a family.








### 5 Days


Ideal for a focused escape. Dive deep into one or two regions with minimal travel time, maximizing every moment of your Costa Rica adventure itinerary for solo travelers, couples, or small families.

Quick Escape



San José (SJO)

San José
→
La Fortuna / Arenal
→
Monteverde


Perfect for couples craving volcano views and cloud forest mystique in a compact timeline.



Liberia (LIR)

Liberia
→
Rincón de la Vieja
→
Tamarindo


Suits families looking for volcanic adventure and Pacific surf without long drives.









### 7 Days


The classic Costa Rica sampler. Connect signature landscapes — from misty highlands to coastal jungle — with a balanced pace that suits a 7 day Costa Rica family adventure trip or a romantic couples getaway.

Classic Journey



San José (SJO)

San José
→
Manuel Antonio
→
Monteverde
→
Arenal


A wildlife-rich Costa Rica couples adventure vacation blending Pacific beaches with cloud forest serenity.



Liberia (LIR)

Liberia
→
Rincón de la Vieja
→
Tamarindo
→
Monteverde


Ideal for families wanting volcanic adventure, surf, and cloud forest in one well-paced week.









### 10 Days


The full Costa Rica adventure travel experience. Cross the country from Pacific to Caribbean, with ample time for off-the-beaten-path detours and the lush, often-overlooked Caribbean coast.

Grand Explorer



San José (SJO)

San José
→
Arenal
→
Monteverde
→
Manuel Antonio
→
Puerto Viejo


A cross-country Costa Rica adventure itinerary for solo travelers who want it all — volcanoes, cloud forest, Pacific beaches, and Caribbean vibes.



Liberia (LIR)

Liberia
→
Rincón de la Vieja
→
Tamarindo
→
Monteverde
→
Puerto Viejo


For families and couples ready for a grand loop: volcanoes, Pacific surf, cloud forest, and Caribbean soul in ten unforgettable days.







Plan Your Adventure






























## Adventures That Feel Like Postcards


From the roar of the Pacific to the whisper of the cloud forest, our itineraries are crafted to ignite your senses. Whether you're chasing adrenaline or solitude, each day is a carefully balanced blend of thrill and tranquility.








### 5-Day Solo Explorer


Surf mornings in Tamarindo, sunset yoga, and a night hike to the crater's edge.









### 7-Day Couples Escape


Zipline through misty canopies, unwind in volcanic hot springs, and share farm-to-table dinners under the stars.









### 10-Day Family Adventure


Snorkel the Caribbean reefs, meet local artisans in Tortuguero, and explore the rainforest together.

















## Adapting the Same Route to Your Travel Style


Every itinerary flexes across three traveler profiles — solo explorers, couples, and families — so the same 7‑day route feels entirely yours. Below is how rhythm, intensity, and overnight pace shift without losing the adventure.











### Solo Explorer



Route Speed
Fast & flexible — early starts, spontaneous detours, and longer driving days to pack in remote corners like the Caribbean coast.


Activity Intensity
High — whitewater rafting on the Pacuare, night hikes in Monteverde, and sunrise volcano summits with no schedule but your own.


Overnight Rhythm
Boutique eco-lodges and social hostels — one or two nights per stop to keep momentum high.












### Couples



Route Speed
Balanced — scenic drives with built-in coffee-farm stops, sunset sails on Lake Arenal, and time to linger at hot springs.


Activity Intensity
Moderate — guided rainforest walks, private surf lessons, and candlelit treehouse dinners replace breakneck adventure with shared wonder.


Overnight Rhythm
Boutique retreats and adults-only ecolodges — two to three nights per region for deeper connection.












### Families



Route Speed
Gentle — shorter drive days, frequent wildlife-spotting breaks, and kid-friendly beach towns like Puerto Viejo on the Caribbean side.


Activity Intensity
Low to moderate — sloth sanctuary visits, chocolate-making workshops, gentle river floats, and hands-on science at the Children's Eternal Rainforest.


Overnight Rhythm
Family-run lodges with pools and connecting rooms — three nights minimum in each base to build a home-away-from-home routine.












### Which Airport Fits Your Route?


Fly into San José (SJO) for itineraries weighted toward the Caribbean coast, southern Pacific, and central highlands. Choose Liberia (LIR) when your adventure focuses on Guanacaste beaches, Rincon de la Vieja, and the Nicoya Peninsula. Both gateways connect seamlessly to every 5‑, 7‑, and 10‑day route we design.


















## Your Costa Rica adventure itinerary starts here


Use these curated routes as the foundation for a custom-feeling trip — whether you're a solo explorer, a couple seeking hidden beaches, or a family ready for volcano hikes and sloth sightings. Let's shape your perfect 5, 7, or 10-day journey together.


Plan Your Adventure

## Explore Every Corner: Caribbean to Pacific Routes — Costa Rica Here and Now

URL: https://example.com/regions-routes
Description: Go beyond the usual with routes spanning Costa Rica&#39;s full geographic diversity, including the hidden Caribbean coast. Map your adventure and travel deeper than ever before.

Explore Every Corner: Caribbean to Pacific Routes — Costa Rica Here and Now

Contact






















# Explore Costa Rica by Region & Gateway


From the Pacific surf to volcanic highlands, misty cloud forests, and the vibrant Caribbean coast — every route begins at SJO or Liberia. Discover curated 5, 7, and 10-day adventures designed for solo explorers, couples, and families.





















SJO

Liberia







## Major Regions & Route Logic


From two international airports, four distinct regions unfold across Costa Rica — each reachable within a day's drive, and each offering a dramatically different rhythm for your adventure itinerary.








### Pacific Coast


Sun-baked surf towns, cliffside infinity views, and the deep blue of the Nicoya Peninsula.


Best reached from Liberia (LIR) — 1.5 hours to the sand.









### Caribbean Coast


Lush, laid-back, and culturally rich — where reggae beats drift through rainforest canals and turtle-nesting beaches stretch for miles.


A scenic 3-hour drive from San José (SJO) through Braulio Carrillo National Park.









### Volcano Belt


Arenal's perfect cone rises above thermal rivers and hanging bridges, while Rincón de la Vieja steams with geothermal drama.


Accessible from both airports — 2.5 hours from Liberia, 3 hours from SJO.









### Cloud Forest & Interior


Misty highland trails in Monteverde, resplendent quetzals, and the cool green heart of the continental divide.


A winding 3-hour climb from San José, or a scenic lake crossing from Arenal.


























### Pacific Coast


Black-sand beaches and world-class surf anchor the western edge of any Costa Rica adventure itinerary for solo travelers, couples, and families alike.












### Caribbean Coast


Untamed and authentic, the Caribbean side rewards explorers with Afro-Caribbean culture, turtle nesting grounds, and routes often overlooked in a 7 day Costa Rica family adventure trip.












### Volcano Country


Thermal springs and lava fields define the central highlands, an essential stop for any Costa Rica couples adventure vacation seeking geothermal wonder.












### Cloud Forest


Misty canopies and hanging bridges invite slow travel through Monteverde's emerald heights, a highlight of any Costa Rica adventure travel route.


















Entry Points


## Choose Your Arrival Airport


Costa Rica offers two main international gateways — each unlocking a distinct rhythm of adventure. Understanding the differences helps you build the perfect 5, 7, or 10-day itinerary, whether you're a solo explorer, a couple, or a family.








San José

SJO
Juan Santamaría International


The central hub. Ideal for travelers who want maximum geographic diversity, combining volcano highlands, cloud forests, and the vibrant Caribbean coast in a single trip.





### Best-Fit Regions


- Central Valley & Volcanoes (Poás, Irazú)

- Cloud Forests (Monteverde, Bajos del Toro)

- Caribbean Coast (Tortuguero, Puerto Viejo)

- Pacific Central (Manuel Antonio, Jacó)





### Ideal Trip Lengths


5 Days: Volcano + Cloud Forest
7 Days: Caribbean + Central Valley
10 Days: Full Coast-to-Coast Loop




### Best For


Solo explorers craving ecological variety and families wanting a mix of adventure and wildlife without long transfer days.







Guanacaste

LIR
Daniel Oduber Quirós International


The northern gateway. Perfect for travelers prioritizing the sun-drenched Pacific coast, dry tropical forests, and seamless access to the Nicoya Peninsula's surf towns and luxury resorts.





### Best-Fit Regions


- Guanacaste Beaches (Tamarindo, Conchal)

- Nicoya Peninsula (Santa Teresa, Nosara)

- Rincón de la Vieja Volcano

- Arenal & Northern Lowlands





### Ideal Trip Lengths


5 Days: Beach + Volcano Combo
7 Days: Nicoya Surf & Yoga Retreat
10 Days: Pacific Grand Loop to Arenal




### Best For


Couples seeking romantic sunsets and boutique stays, and families wanting easy beach access with shorter drive times.












On longer 10-day itineraries, you can easily cross the country from coast to coast — fly into SJO and out of Liberia (or vice versa) to experience the full geographic diversity without backtracking.















## Choose Your Path Through Costa Rica


Whether you start by picking a region that calls to you or by planning around your arrival airport, our curated 5, 7, and 10-day itineraries help solo explorers, couples, and families build the perfect Costa Rica adventure — with the Caribbean coast always within reach.

Get Personalized Route Help

# Not sure which adventure fits you best? Let's plan it together.


Whether you're a solo explorer craving the Caribbean coast, a couple looking for a romantic 7-day escape, or a family ready for a 10-day journey across volcanoes and beaches — we're here to help. Tell us your travel style, preferred duration, and arrival airport (SJO or Liberia), and we'll point you toward the perfect Costa Rica adventure itinerary.

















Full Name



Email Address



Phone Number



Your Message





I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy


Send Message




## Let's Shape Your Journey


Every great Costa Rica adventure starts with a conversation. To help us craft your perfect itinerary, tell us a little about your travel vision.








### Trip Length


Are you planning a 5, 7, or 10 day adventure?









### Arrival Airport


Will you fly into San José (SJO) or Liberia (LIR)?









### Traveler Profile


Solo explorer, couple, or family adventure?















## Common Questions for Your Costa Rica Adventure


Practical answers to help solo explorers, couples, and families plan their perfect itinerary with confidence.








### Which airport is better — SJO or Liberia?


It depends on your first destination. Fly into SJO for the Caribbean coast, Central Valley, or southern Pacific. Choose Liberia for quick access to Guanacaste beaches, Rincon de la Vieja, and the Nicoya Peninsula.







### Can the Caribbean fit into a shorter trip?


Absolutely. A 5-day itinerary from SJO can include Tortuguero or Cahuita with careful pacing. For a deeper Caribbean experience, our 7 and 10-day plans weave the coast in seamlessly.







### Which itinerary length is best for families?


We recommend 7 or 10 days for families. This allows a relaxed pace with built-in downtime, kid-friendly wildlife encounters, and a mix of beach and rainforest without feeling rushed.







### Is a Costa Rica adventure safe for solo travelers?


Yes — Costa Rica is one of the safest countries in Latin America for solo explorers. Our itineraries prioritize well-connected routes, reputable accommodations, and clear transport logistics so you can focus on the journey.







### What makes a couples adventure different?


Couples itineraries balance adventure with romance — think private hot springs, sunset sails, boutique eco-lodges, and volcano-view dinners. We design days that feel intimate without sacrificing exploration.







### Do I need a 4x4 vehicle for these trips?


Many of our recommended routes include gravel roads and rural areas where a 4x4 gives you freedom and comfort. We note vehicle recommendations clearly on each itinerary so there are no surprises.















## Your Costa Rica adventure feels best when the route fits your style and available days


Whether you're a solo explorer, a couple seeking hidden beaches, or a family ready for volcano hikes and jungle wildlife — the perfect itinerary is already waiting. Reach out through the form above and let's start shaping your journey.



Send a Message

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- Traveler Profiles
- Itineraries
- Regions & Routes



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/15/2026



Costa Rica Here and Now ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Costa Rica Here and Now

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Traveler Profiles

- Regions & Routes



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 15, 2026



Costa Rica Here and Now is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Costa Rica Here and Now

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.














Your premium editorial journey through Costa Rica — immersive inspiration meets practical trip planning for solo travelers, couples, and families.

## Terms & Conditions

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 15, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Costa Rica Here and Now

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Travel & Tourism provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Costa Rica Here and Now provides Travel & Tourism through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Costa Rica Here and Now. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Costa Rica Here and Now

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
